data.title: AS Pro Kapital Grupp announces identification and remediation of technical covenant breach under its outstanding bonds 2020/2028
data.description: On March 25, 2026, AS Pro Kapital Grupp confirmed that its subsidiary, OÜ Kalaranna Kvartal, breached the maintenance test covenant on the subsidiary level. This breach was identified in relation to the Company's senior secured bonds 2020/2028 with ISIN SE0013801172. The breach constitutes a technical default under the terms and conditions of the bonds.

data.title: CFTC chair Selig suggests blockchain may verify AI-driven content, emphasizing timestamps and onchain IDs to differentiate authentic from synthetic media. Calls for light regulation for AI agents.
data.description: The regulatory body believes that using timestamps and on-chain identifiers can help differentiate genuine media from synthetic content. They are also advocating for a minimalistic approach to overseeing AI agents, emphasizing the importance of employing these tools for ensuring authenticity in media and regulating AI effectively.

data.title: Bittensor's TAO price could drop by 40% soon, following a 160% surge in a month with a golden cross signal emerging.
data.description: The price of TAO has surged by 160% over the span of one month. However, there are concerns as a familiar golden cross pattern is emerging. In the past, this pattern has signaled significant price corrections.

data.title: Matillion Launches Maia's Migration Agent: Autonomous Migration for Legacy ETL Platforms
data.description: Matillion has introduced Migration Agent, a new feature within Maia software, that enables the conversion of legacy ETL pipelines from 14 different platforms to contemporary cloud data warehouses. This innovation allows for the compression of migration programs that typically take multiple quarters into just a matter of weeks. The announcement was made in Denver and Manchester, England, on March 26, 2026. This technology offers a significant reduction in migration timelines, streamlining the process for organizations looking to transition their data operations to the cloud.

data.title: Experts discuss LaGuardia's safety challenges post Sunday's runway accident; not unique in aviation concerns.
data.description: Aviation regulators, pilots, and industry professionals have expressed concerns about runway accidents similar to the recent incident at LaGuardia Airport on Sunday.

data.title: WORKERS AT CORE-MARK JOIN TEAMSTERS
data.description: 70 drivers employed at Core-Mark, a subsidiary of Performance Food Group (PFG), have recently decided to unionize by joining Teamsters Local 952. Their primary objective is to commence negotiations for their initial contract. This transition was confirmed on March 26, 2026, in Orange, California.

data.title: Some airports rely on private screeners, offering shorter wait times in minutes, like at San Francisco and Kansas City Intl.
data.description: Several airports, such as San Francisco and Kansas City International, are part of a program allowing them to utilize private screeners instead of T.S.A. agents.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Drops As Trump's War Comments Hit Stocks; Oil Surges (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following President Trump's warning to Iran to expedite negotiations for a peace agreement. Concurrently, oil prices saw a significant increase. The stock market today witnessed a drop, with the Dow Jones being notably impacted by Trump's remarks on potential conflict, and oil prices surged. This live coverage on the current stock market activities highlights the repercussions of Trump's statements on Iran, with the Dow experiencing a downturn and oil prices rising rapidly.

data.title: The Gates by City Ventures Opens This Weekend in Morgan Hill
data.description: In Morgan Hill, California, City Ventures, a top builder of solar-powered homes, has revealed the Grand Opening of The Gates scheduled for this Saturday, March 28. This new community provides a blend of sustainable and affordable housing options in a vibrant, mixed-use environment within Santa Clara County. The project offers a rare opportunity for buyers to invest in eco-friendly homes in a sought-after location. This initiative aims to cater to the growing demand for environmentally conscious living in the region.
